question: Will the Gaza death toll be over 150,000 at the end of the Israel-Hamas war
reason: Multiple authoritative sources estimate Gaza death tolls between 70,000 and 75,000, with some studies suggesting higher figures.
evidence: A senior Israeli security official stated that approximately 70,000 Palestinians have been killed in Gaza since October 2023. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/jan/30/israel-military-gaza-death-toll-broadly-accurate?utm_source=openai))

A study published in The Lancet Global Health estimated over 75,000 deaths in the first 16 months of the war, at least 25,000 more than the official toll at the time. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/feb/19/gaza-death-toll-higher-than-reported-lancet-study?utm_source=openai))

The Geneva Academy of International Humanitarian Law and Human Rights reported that the death toll may have exceeded 200,000, citing a population decline of over 10% since October 2023. ([presstv.co.uk](https://www.presstv.co.uk/Detail/2026/02/12/763925/Palestine-Gaza-Israel-war-Geneva-Academy-US-ceasefire-death-toll?utm_source=openai))
